error_signature: Could not replace placeholders in body: Expected ‘,’ or ‘}’
title: Error replacing placeholders in HTTP Request Tool
symptom: When using placeholders in the JSON body of an HTTP Request, an error occurs stating 'Could not replace placeholders in body: Expected ‘,’ or ‘}’'.
not_this_if: JSON is correctly formatted without placeholders
root_cause: The error occurs because the HTTP Request Tool expects a valid JSON format, and including placeholders directly in the JSON string can lead to parsing errors. The placeholders need to be handled differently to avoid breaking the JSON structure.
fix_steps: Remove the type specification for the placeholders in the JSON body.
Ensure the placeholders are formatted correctly as strings within the JSON.
agent_instruction: Adjust the JSON body to remove type specifications for placeholders.
